description: Golden cases for comparing processed PSD datasets across channels and frequency grids.

cases.title: Synthetic PSD case
cases.purpose: Verify exact-ratio and RMS comparison behavior on generated PSD data with a known answer.
checks: PSD ratio summary matches the known synthetic delta
integrated RMS delta is within tolerance

cases.title: Known AR01/AR02 comparison case
cases.purpose: Verify the review workflow on a representative AR01-to-AR02 comparison with known channel-level conclusions.
checks: known unchanged channels remain below review threshold
review summary separates global findings from channel findings

cases.title: Missing channel case
cases.purpose: Verify that missing baseline or candidate channels produce a controlled finding instead of a silent pass.

cases.title: Mismatched frequency grid case
cases.purpose: Verify frequency-grid mismatch handling and interpolation/abort policy.
checks: comparison follows the declared interpolation policy
